description: Page 2 Reds Drive Nazis From Bryansk Rail Center Evacuated According to Plan By United Pres LONDON Sept 14 Germany today acknowledged loss of Bryansk great railroad hub linking the central and southern fronts in Russia and Moscow said a Red Army column was rac ing in against the Nazi flank to cut off the routed garrison Berlin in its familiar manner of talking into an admission of a major defeat said the German garrison evac uated Bryansk last night according to plan after it had destroyed all the installations so thoroly that the Soviets are putting their hands in an empty pocket 1 miles Leningrod I 4 SOVIET RUSSIA Shiroya Russa X lUhe MOSCOW XT l WßryaMk7oi SGome 1 Varcxxls V oßljoro4 K ha rk ov t K n Russian Ibices reached the banks of the Desna River opposite Bryansk yes terday with the capture of two rail road stations in the outskirts and set the stage for a flanking drive by seiz ing Tsementny 14 miles to the north and Ivot 3C miles to the north RAIL HUB The fall of Bryansk a town of 85 000 and the hub of railroads radiating to Moscow Kharkov Gomel Kiev

description: Page 2 3 Great Centers Almost in Reds Grasp Crimea and Ukraine Key Cities Toppling By HENRY SHAPIRO United Prri Staff Correspondent MOSCOW Sept 22Red armies which already have liberated more than half the Soviet terri tory overrun by Germany had Smolensk once Hitlers headquarters Kiev capital of the Ukraine and Melitopol key to the Crimea almost within their grasp today Melitopol astride the main escape route for thousands of Germans in the Crimea was expected to fall momentarily and Smolensk and Kiev probably will not be able to hold out long against the onrushing Soviets front dispatches said The London radio said Rus sian troops were within sight of the golden domes of the churches of Kiev A Berlin dispatch published in the Madrid newspaper Ya said the Ger mans already had evacuated army ad ministrative services from Kiev 1150 TOWNS CAPTURED Mordinovka three miles from Melito pol was captured by the Russians yes terday along with 70 other towns and villages on the MelitopolZaporozhe front and the Soviet high command announced the enemy was abandoning one position after another In one village alone the communique said the Russians captured 500000 shells while in another they seized nine tanks
